violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Roller grills are not covered. They do not have covers/sneeze guards available.
Reheating food. — --Hamburgers from previous day service placed into crock pot of au jus to reheat. *Directed to use flat top grill or roaster for reheat.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Dried food debris at interior door of cheese machine. -Dried food debris on gloves used for hot cheese bags.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani bucket found at greater than 400ppm Quat.
Reheating food. — --Nearly full can of cheese heated and cooled yesterday was placed into cheese warmer to reheat today.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Standing water in 3 door glass cooler. *Dripping from center of interior drain pan-may need to defrost drain lines and/or re-support center of drain pan.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
